issues.message: outbound 'quic-ech-experimental': Encrypted Client Hello (ECH) is behind the 'tls_ech' feature flag; without it, ECH configuration is silently ignored
issues.hint: enable the 'tls_ech' feature flag at build time for ECH support

issues.message: outbound 'quic-ech-experimental': QUIC + ECH is in experimental mode; runtime behavior may fail or change and should not be treated as production-ready
issues.hint: keep experimental scope small, capture handshake evidence, and prefer TCP+TLS ECH for production paths
